summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned because close/comment/label are blocked and no candidate has complete merge preflight proof, including a passed Codex /review.

actions.reason: This looks like a small, plausible fix with passing checks, but merge cannot be recommended until a fresh Codex /review completes cleanly and mergeability is confirmed.
The PR appears narrow and well-positioned, but merge needs maintainer/Codex review proof before Clownfish can recommend it.

Canonical choice between overlapping browser-download PRs is a maintainer decision. #93859 may be the better current candidate because it has supplied proof, but it still lacks complete merge preflight and overlaps with #74411.
The code delta is narrow and likely repairable on the contributor branch, but failed validation and missing real behavior proof block merge.
The implementation is small and probably repairable, but failed real behavior proof blocks merge and fixed-by-candidate closeout.

needs_human: #93844: run/inspect fresh Codex /review and confirm mergeability before merge recommendation.
#93856: run/inspect fresh Codex /review and confirm mergeability before merge recommendation.
#93859: maintainer should choose the canonical browser-download PR path among #93859 and overlapping #74411 before merge or replacement.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the two narrow contributor PRs that are blocked by validation/proof rather than replacing them immediately. #93861 needs failed auto-reply validation and real behavior proof addressed. #93863 needs real behavior proof for the config.patch restart notice path.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair foreground reply and config.patch proof blockers
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for Clownfish inventory live-pr-inventory-20260617T081753-001.

This keeps contributor credit for #93861 and #93863 while addressing the validation blockers that prevent merge recommendation.

Scope:
- Re-run and repair the foreground reply freshness regression covered by #93861 / #93831.
- Re-run and repair the config.patch restart-required notice proof covered by #93863 / #46797.

Validation:
- pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/auto-reply/dispatch.freshness.test.ts
- pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/infra/restart-sentinel.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Credit: source PRs #93861 and #93863 by arkyu2077 / Jasmine Zhang.
validation_commands: pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/auto-reply/dispatch.freshness.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/infra/restart-sentinel.test.ts
credit_notes: Preserve credit for arkyu2077 / Jasmine Zhang as author of PR #93861 and PR #93863 if repaired or replaced.
If a replacement PR is opened, include source PR attribution for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93861 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93863.
